ddls:
CREATE TABLE "quizzes" (
  "quiz_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quiz */,
  "quiz_title" TEXT /* Title of the quiz */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the quiz */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the quiz was created */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the quiz in minutes */,
  "total_marks" INTEGER /* Total marks for the quiz */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who created the quiz */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the quiz */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the quiz is active */,
  "allow_feedback" INTEGER /* Allows feedback from students */,
  "is_randomized" INTEGER /* Indicates if the questions are randomized */,
  "is_timed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the quiz is timed */,
  "allow_multiple_attempts" INTEGER /* Allows multiple attempts on the quiz */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quiz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quizzes_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES quiz_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "quiz_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quiz that the question belongs to */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "option_a" TEXT /* Option A text */,
  "option_b" TEXT /* Option B text */,
  "option_c" TEXT /* Option C text */,
  "option_d" TEXT /* Option D text */,
  "correct_answer" TEXT /* The correct answer option */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of the question (multiple-choice, true/false, short answer) */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the question */,
  "explanation" TEXT /* Explanation for the correct answer */,
  "is_randomized" INTEGER /* Indicates if the options are randomized */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_difficulty_level FOREIGN KEY ("difficulty_level") REFERENCES difficulty_levels ("level_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_question_type FOREIGN KEY ("question_type") REFERENCES question_types ("type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_quiz_id FOREIGN KEY ("quiz_id") REFERENCES quizzes ("quiz_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the instructor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the instructor account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the instructor account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the instructor account is active */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the instructor (e.g., admin, instructor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the student account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the student account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the student account is active */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the student (e.g., student) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_quiz_attempts" (
  "attempt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attempt */,
  "quiz_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quiz being attempted */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student making the attempt */,
  "attempt_date" TEXT /* Date when the attempt was made */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the student */,
  "total_marks" INTEGER /* Total marks of the quiz */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the attempt is completed */,
  "time_started" TEXT /* Start time of the attempt */,
  "time_completed" TEXT /* Completion time of the attempt */,
  "attempts_left" INTEGER /* Number of attempts left */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attempt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_quiz_attempts_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_quiz_attempts_quiz_id FOREIGN KEY ("quiz_id") REFERENCES quizzes ("quiz_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quiz_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the quiz result record */,
  "attempt_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quiz attempt */,
  "correct_answers" INTEGER /* Number of correct answers */,
  "incorrect_answers" INTEGER /* Number of incorrect answers */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback on the quiz attempt */,
  "is_passed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the student passed the quiz */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage score */,
  "feedback_provided" INTEGER /* Indicates if feedback has been provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quiz_results_attempt_id FOREIGN KEY ("attempt_id") REFERENCES student_quiz_attempts ("attempt_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "quiz_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quiz for which the report is generated */,
  "total_attempts" INTEGER /* Total number of attempts for the quiz */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score obtained in the quiz */,
  "date_generated" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "pass_rate" REAL /* Pass rate of the quiz */,
  "median_score" REAL /* Median score of the quiz */,
  "min_score" REAL /* Minimum score obtained */,
  "max_score" REAL /* Maximum score obtained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_quiz_id FOREIGN KEY ("quiz_id") REFERENCES quizzes ("quiz_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "quiz_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quiz being reviewed */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student providing feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feedback is anonymous */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feedback has been resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who resolved the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_quiz_id FOREIGN KEY ("quiz_id") REFERENCES quizzes ("quiz_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quiz_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Biology, Chemistry) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quiz_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting entry */,
  "quiz_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quiz for which settings apply */,
  "is_timed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the quiz is timed */,
  "allow_multiple_attempts" INTEGER /* Allows multiple attempts on the quiz */,
  "randomize_questions" INTEGER /* Randomizes the order of questions in the quiz */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quiz_settings_quiz_id FOREIGN KEY ("quiz_id") REFERENCES quizzes ("quiz_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the question type (e.g., multiple-choice, true/false, short answer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the question type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "difficulty_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each difficulty level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the difficulty level (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the difficulty level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)
